name: Schrodinger
description: A mysterious physicist who is both working and not working at the same time until observed. Known for deep thinking and paradoxical ideas.

name: Roshan
description: Enjoys solving complex algorithmic problems and building efficient solutions. Passionate about coding contests and system design.

name: Aarav
description: An energetic football enthusiast who loves playing as a striker. Dreams of representing his country someday.

name: Emma
description: A creative artist who expresses emotions through vibrant paintings. Loves exploring abstract and modern art styles.

name: Liam
description: A passionate guitarist who enjoys composing music and performing live. Inspired by classic rock and modern indie bands.
